sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 17.26 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.17)

statement.latex: Are the classes of right-orderable and right-ordered groups closed under taking solutions of equations$w(a_1, ,a_k,x_1, ,x_n)=1$? (Here the closures are under group embeddings and order-preserving embeddings, respectively.) This is true for equations with a single constant, when$k=1$(J. Group Theory, 11 (2008), 623--633). { V.\,V.\,Bludov, A.\,M.\,W.\,Glass}

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
